A

Alien - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Represents one alien enemy on the grid.
Alien(float, float, int) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Creates an alien at a given position with a given type.
ALIEN_COLS - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Number of columns in the alien grid.
ALIEN_DROP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Pixels dropped down when aliens reach the edge.
ALIEN_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Height of the alien sprite box.
ALIEN_ROWS - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Number of rows in the alien grid.
ALIEN_STEP - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Horizontal pixels moved per movement tick.
ALIEN_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Width of the alien sprite box.
Alien.Bomb - Class in io.github.javainvaders
A bomb droped by an alien.
alienDescend - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
True when aliens should drop down on the next tick.
alienDescend - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
True when aliens should descend on the next movement tick.
alienDirX - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
Current horizontal movement direction, +1 or -1.
alienDirX - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Current horizontal direction of alien movement (+1 or -1).
alienMoveInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Time between alien movement ticks.
alienMoveInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Time between alien movement ticks.
alienMoveState - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Mutable alien movement state (direction and descend flag).
AlienMoveState - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Tiny bag of mutable alien movement state.
AlienMoveState(float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.AlienMoveState
Creates the state with an initial direction.
alienMoveTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown until aliens take another step.
alienMoveTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Countdown until aliens take another step.
aliens - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
The alien grid.
aliens - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
The alien grid.
alive - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Wether this alien is still in play.
alive - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Wether the ship is currently on screen and active.
allAliensDead() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Returns true if every alien is dead.
allPlayersDead() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.
allPlayersDead(Player, Player) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Returns true when both players are dead with no lives remaining.
awardLevelBonus() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Awards completion bonus to players that are still alive or have lives left.
awardLevelBonus(Player, Player, int, int[]) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Awards the level-completion bonus to any player that still has lives or is alive.

B

batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Batch for drawing text on top of the game.
batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Batch for drawing sprites and text.
batch - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Batch used for drawing text.
bigFont - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Big font for titles and game-over messages.
bigFont - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Bigger font for titles and big messages.
blinkInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Controls how fast the ship flickers on/off.
blinkTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Total time the blink animation still runs for.
blinkVisible - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Wether the ship is visible during a blink frame.
Bomb(float, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Creates a bomb at the given position (usually bottom of an alien).
BOMB_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Height of the bomb sprite.
BOMB_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
How fast bombs fall downward.
BOMB_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Width of the bomb sprite.
bombInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
How often (seconds) a bomb drops.
bombInterval - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
How often (in seconds) a bomb is droped.
bombs - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
All bombs currently falling.
bombs - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
All bombs currently falling.
bombTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown until next bomb is droped.
bombTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Countdown until next bomb is droped.
bonusAwarded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Bonus points awarded to each player at level end.
bonusAwarded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Bonus points awarded to each player at level end.
Bullet(float, float, int) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Creates a bullet at the given position for the given player.
BULLET_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Heigh of the bullet sprite.
BULLET_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
How fast bullets travell upward.
BULLET_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Width of the bullet sprite.
bullets - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
All bullets currently flying.
bullets - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
All bullets currently flying.

C

camera - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Orthographic camera that maps game coords to screen coords.
checkCollisions() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player, and alien/player collisions.
checkCollisions() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Checks bullet/alien, bomb/player, and alien/player collisions.
cleanUp() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Removes any explosions whose timer has run out.
cleanUp() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Removes expired explosions from the list.
create() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
currentScreen - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Which screen is active — written by Screen callbacks too.
currentScreen - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Which screen is currently active.

D

dispose() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
drawAlien(Alien) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Draws an alien using shape primitives.
drawHUD(SpriteBatch, BitmapFont, Player, Player, int, float, int, int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Draws the HUD score text for both players and the current level label.
drawLives(Player, float, float, Color) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Draws small ship icons representing remaining lives for a player.
drawLives(Player, float, float, Color, ShapeRenderer) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Draws small ship icons representing remaining lives.
drawShip(Player, Color) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Draws the ship body and "wings" using shape primitives.
drawShip(Player, Color, ShapeRenderer) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Draws the ship body and wings using shape primitives.
dropBomb() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb.
dropBomb() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Picks a random alive alien to drop a bomb.

H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen

handleMenu(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Delegates main-menu input to screenManager and acts on the result.
handlePause(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main

I

index - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Which player this is: 1 or 2.
initialShootTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Short grace period at level start so holding shoot doesnt instantly fire a bullet.
initialShootTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Short grace period at level start so holding shoot doesnt instantly fire a bullet.
initLevel() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level.
initLevel() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Initialises (or re-initialises) the current level.
io.github.javainvaders - package io.github.javainvaders
 

K

killPlayer(Player) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Marks a player as dead and starts the respawn/blink animation.
killPlayer(Player, Array<Main.Explosion>) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Marks a player as dead and kicks off the respawn/blink animation.

L

level - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Current level number (1-3).
level - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Current level number (1-3).

levelBonus(int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Calculates the level-completion bonus based on the current level.
levelCompleteTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Countdown shown on the level-complete screen.
levelCompleteTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Countdown shown on the level-complete screen.
lives - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
How many lives this player still has.
LOAD_GAME - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
 
loaded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Set during loadGame so initLevel doesnt reset the loaded player state.
loaded - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Flag set during loadGame() so initLevel() knows not to overwrite the loaded player state.
loadGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Reads the save file and restores game state, or starts new if file is missing/bad.
loadGame(Game) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Reads the save file and restores game state into the given Game instance.

M

Reference back to main so we can flip currentScreen.

MenuAction() - Constructor for enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.MenuAction
 
menuSelection - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Currently highlighted option in the main menu (0-2).
moveAliens() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Moves all alive aliens one step, and triggers descent when they hit a wall.

pauseSelection - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen

Player - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Represents a player ship in the game.
Player(int, float) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Sets up a new player at the given x position.
Player.Bullet - Class in io.github.javainvaders
A bullet fired by a player ship.
pointsForAlien(int) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Returns how many points an alien of the given type is worth.
PTS_TYPE0 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points given for a type-0 (basic) alien kill.
PTS_TYPE1 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points for a type-1 (medium) alien kill.
PTS_TYPE2 - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Score
Points for a type-2 (tough) alien kill.

R

rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien.Bomb
Hitbox for collision checks agaisnt player ships.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Hitbox for collision checks against bullets or players.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player.Bullet
Hitbox for collision checks.
rect() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Returns the hitbox rectangle used for collision detection.
render() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
 
renderGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Draws the entire gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.
renderGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Draws the entire gameplay frame: ships, aliens, bullets, bombs, HUD.
renderGameOver(boolean, int, int) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the game-over (or win) screen with final scores.
renderLevelComplete(int, int[], float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the level-complete screen with bonus info and countdown.
renderMenu() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Draws the main menu with title and 3 options.
renderPause(Runnable) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Renders the pause overlay on top of the frozen game frame.
resetMenuSelection() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Resets the main menu cursor to the top.
resetPauseSelection() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Resets the pause cursor to "RESUME".
respawnTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Time left before the player respawns after dying.
RESUME - Enum constant in enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.PauseAction
 

S

Save - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Handles persisting and restoring game state to/from a local file.
Save() - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Save
 
SAVE_FILE - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
File name used to persist save data locally.
SAVE_FILE - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
File name written to the app's local storage directory.
saveFeedbackTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Timer driving the "Saved!" feedback text fade.
saveFeedbackTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Timer driving the "Saved!" feedback text fade.
saveGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Writes current game state to a local save file.
saveGame(Game) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Save
Writes the current game state to the save file.
score - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Current score for this player.
Score - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Handles score calcualtion and level bonuses.
Score() - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Score
 
Screen - Class in io.github.javainvaders
Manages all non-gameplay screens: the main menu, pause menu, level-complete screen and game-over screen.
Screen(BitmapFont, BitmapFont, SpriteBatch, ShapeRenderer) - Constructor for class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Creates the screen manager.
Screen.MenuAction - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
Actions the main menu can trigger.
Screen.PauseAction - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
Actions the pause menu can trigger.
Screen.State - Enum Class in io.github.javainvaders
All posible game states / screens.
screenManager - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Handles all menu/pause rendering and their input.
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Renderer for ships, aliens, bullets, etc.
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Renderer for shapes (ships, aliens, bullets, etc).
shapes - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Shape renderer used for the pause overlay.
SHIP_H - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
How tall the ship is.
SHIP_SPEED - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Movement speed of the ship (pixels per second).
SHIP_W - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
How wide the ship is, in pixels.
SHOOT_COOLDOWN - Static variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Min time between shots.
shootTimer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Countdown before player can shoot again.
startNewGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Starts a fresh game from level 1 with full lives.
startNewGame() - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Starts a fresh game from level 1 with full lives.
State() - Constructor for enum class io.github.javainvaders.Screen.State
 

T

timer - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Main.Explosion
Time remaining before the explosion dissapears.
type - Variable in class io.github.javainvaders.Alien
Visual/point type: 0 = basic, 1 = medium, 2 = tough.

U

updateGame(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Main update step while in the GAMEPLAY state.
updateGame(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Main update step while in the GAMEPLAY state.
updateGameOver(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Handles input on the game-over screen.
updateLevelComplete(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Game
Handles the level-complete countdown and transitions to next level or game-over.
updateLevelComplete(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Handles the level-complete countdown and transitions to next level or game-over.
updateMenu(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Handles keyboard input on the main menu.
updatePause(float) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Screen
Handles keyboard input while paused.
updatePlayer(Player, float, int, int, int) - Method in class io.github.javainvaders.Main
Updates a single player: handles movement input, shoot cooldown and respawn blink animation.
updatePlayer(Player, float, int, int, int, Array<Player.Bullet>, int, float) - Static method in class io.github.javainvaders.Player
Updates a single player: movement input, shoot cooldown, and respawn blink.
